2606.20152.title: From Texts to Scores: Tracing the Emergence of Essay Quality Representations in Large Language Models
2606.20152.paper_summary: Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) have substantially transformed Automated Essay Scoring (AES), yet the internal mechanisms underlying LLM-based scoring remain poorly understood. In this work, we systematically analyze the hidden representations of eight LLMs across two English essay datasets (ASAP++, CSEE) and one Portuguese dataset (ENEM). Using linear probing, cross-prompt generalization, dimensionality reduction, and neuron-level analyses, we find consistent evidence that essay quality information is encoded in a linearly accessible form within LLM representations. These representations emerge progressively across layers, remain robust across prompting strategies, and partially transfer across essay prompts despite differences in scoring rubrics. In addition, nonlinear probes provide only marginal and inconsistent improvements over linear probes, suggesting that most essay quality information is already linearly decodable. We further identify individual ``essay scoring neurons'' whose activations strongly correlate with essay scores and whose behavior is sensitive to targeted intervention. Moreover, the layer-wise distribution of these neurons systematically shifts with essay length, with longer essays relying more heavily on deeper layers. Overall, our findings provide evidence that LLMs encode structured representations related to essay quality and offer new insights into the interpretability of LLM-based AES systems.
2606.20152.paper_summary_zh: 最近在大型語言模型（LLMs）方面的進展已經顯著改變了自動化作文評分（AES），然而基於LLM的評分背後的內部機制仍然不甚了解。<lb/>在本研究中，我們系統性地分析了八個LLM在兩個英語作文數據集（ASAP++、CSEE）和一個葡萄牙語數據集（ENEM）上的隱藏表示。<lb/>通過線性探測、跨提示泛化、降維和神經元級別分析，我們發現一致的證據表明，作文質量信息以線性可訪問的形式編碼在LLM表示中。<lb/>這些表示在層中逐漸出現，並在提示策略之間保持穩健，儘管評分標準存在差異，但仍部分轉移於不同的作文提示之間。<lb/>此外，非線性探測僅提供邊際和不一致的改進，相較於線性探測，這表明大多數作文質量信息已經可以線性解碼。<lb/>我們進一步識別出個別的“作文評分神經元”，其激活與作文分數強烈相關，並且其行為對針對性干預敏感。<lb/>此外，這些神經元的層級分佈隨著作文長度的變化而系統性地轉變，較長的作文更依賴於更深的層。<lb/>總體而言，我們的研究結果提供了證據，表明LLMs編碼了與作文質量相關的結構化表示，並為基於LLM的AES系統的可解釋性提供了新的見解。
2606.20152.author: Jiaxu Zuo et.al.
2606.20152.authors: Jiaxu Zuo, Mu You, Kaixin Lan, Tao Fang, Yujia Huo, Henghua Shen, Lidia S. Chao, Derek F. Wong
